creatives.niche_raw: DIY electronics makers, hobbyist hardware coders, open-source hardware community, educators and students building with microcontrollers
creatives.angle_raw: unique and fun DIY electronics — the store where making is joyful, not intimidating

notes: Adafruit homepage identity: 'Adafruit Industries, Unique & fun DIY electronics and kits' — the brand identity claim. Like SparkFun, fetched page is primarily a product catalog with no strong verbal transformation claims. Adafruit is relevant as the ecosystem store for maker hardware; PyBadge/HalloWing game devices exist in the catalog but were not prominently surfaced in this homepage fetch.
